hero.headline: Store your scores safely.
hero.subheadline: Log every game night, track player statistics, and build a permanent archive for your group. Your vault, your data.

items.title: Score logging
items.description: Log scores per player and session. Simple, fast, and always available.

items.title: Statistics
items.description: See who wins most often, achieves the highest scores, and plays the most sessions.

items.title: Permanent archive
items.description: Your game history is always preserved. No data lost, no more arguments about who won.

howItWorks.headline: Your vault, your rules.
howItWorks.subheadline: Four building blocks. Five minutes to set up. A lifetime of game history.

steps.label: Vault
steps.title: Your private vault
steps.description: Every account is a vault — your personal scoreboard that only you manage. Players are labels in your vault, not separate accounts. You stay in control.

steps.label: Games
steps.title: Game templates
steps.description: Create a template for each board game: define the scoring format and notes once, then reuse it forever. Catan, Wingspan, Ticket to Ride — all tracked consistently.

steps.label: Players
steps.title: Players in your group
steps.description: Add everyone in your group as a player. Connect a player to their own Dice Vault account and they'll see their personal stats automatically — no sharing logins.

steps.label: Leagues
steps.title: Competitive leagues
steps.description: Run a league for any game template. The league tracks standings, wins, and history across sessions. Perfect for season play or long-running rivalries.

group.headline: Play together, win together.
group.subheadline: Dice Vault is built for regular game groups. Connect players, run leagues, and keep everyone sharp.

items.title: Leagues
items.description: Create a league for your favourite game. Rankings, statistics, and history — all tracked per season.

items.title: Connected players
items.description: Invite other Dice Vault users as players in your vault. They see their own scores and statistics instantly in their own account.

items.title: Shared results
items.description: Send a public link to any session result. No account needed to view — just share the link.

items.title: Notifications
items.description: Get notified when someone submits a session, sends a connection request, or invites you to a league.

credits.headline: Simple, transparent, fair.
credits.subheadline: No hidden costs. Every action costs a fixed number of credits — you always see what you spend.

free.label: credits / month
free.description: You receive 75 free credits every month automatically. Enough for an active game group.

example.title: What can you do with 75 credits?
example.description: Set up your group: 1 game template (25) + 1 league (10) + 3 connected players (30) = 65 credits. Then log 2 sessions with the remaining 10 credits.
example.note: Credits never expire. Unused credits carry over.

packs.headline: Need more? Buy once.
packs.subheadline: No subscription. Credits never expire. Pay only when you need more.
packs.priceNote: Prices shown are indicative for the EU. Your exact price is determined at checkout based on your region.

methods.title: iDEAL & Bancontact
methods.description: For the Netherlands and Belgium. Pay directly via your own bank.

methods.title: Credit card
methods.description: Visa, Mastercard and American Express — available worldwide.

methods.title: Bitcoin Lightning ⚡
methods.description: Pay with Bitcoin via the Lightning Network. Automatic 10% discount — always.

free.label: Free
free.description: Free forever. Enough for an active group.

cta.headline: Ready to get started?
cta.body: Create a free account and start tracking your scores today. No credit card required.

placeholder.name: Martijn V.
placeholder.review: Finally an app that takes board game score tracking seriously. The league feature is great — our group now plays with a real ranking.

placeholder.name: Sophie K.
placeholder.review: No more arguments about who won. Everything is recorded, and my friends see their own scores immediately.

placeholder.name: Thomas B.
placeholder.review: Simple, fast, and does exactly what you'd expect. Our group uses it every week and the statistics are great.
